meaning: adj.[生]同型结合的,纯合子的
examples: Altogether, half the offspring will be homozygous at that particular locus.
Their newborn daughter died last year from a devastating dwarfism-related disease called homozygous achondroplasia.
Most of the cancers observed in the clinical trials occurred in elderly patients who did not have homozygous FH.
In the pivotal trial with homozygous FH patients mipomersen reduced LDL by 24.7%.
